steps.title: Use the effort clues
steps.content: The process took three years, required more than 250,000 individual images, and forced Reiniger's team to invent new methods and tools. Those details point to a process involving great labor and difficulty.

steps.title: Reject weaker meanings
steps.content: A means disorganized, but the work sounds painstaking. B means conflict-filled, which is not mentioned. C means ineffective, but the film was created successfully. The needed word means requiring great effort. The answer is D.
